Headline: Delays near Ashland/Lake Affecting Green and Pink Line Service
ShortDescription: Green and Pink Line trains are still experiencing delays near Ashland/Lake due to signal problems. Crews working to restore service.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Green and Pink Line trains are still experiencing delays near Ashland/Lake due to signal problems.

At this time, also consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines. These may include these buses:

  • #9 Ashland  
  • #50 Damen

As a result of the delay, shuttle buses for the Green and Pink Lines have been available as follows:

  • Shuttle buses for the Green Line are available to provided connecting service between Clark/Lake and Harlem/Lake in both directions
  • Shuttle buses for the Pink Line are available to provided connecting service between Clark/Lake and Polk in both directions

Personnel are working to restore service. Allow extra travel time.
